name: Creamy Chicken Broccoli Noodles
recipeIngredient: 1 can (14 oz) Cream of Mushroom Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook noodles in a saucepan according to package directions. Add seasoning packets; drain off most of the liquid.
2. Stir in Cream of Mushroom Soup and milk. Heat through, stirring often.
3. Stir in tomatoes (optional).
